title: When Tomorrow Feels Too Heavy
narration: Before the day has even begun, tomorrow can feel louder than today. The messages you have not answered. The decision you cannot make. The fear that you will not be enough. Jesus speaks directly into that weight: “Therefore, don’t be anxious for tomorrow, for tomorrow will be anxious for itself. Each day’s own evil is sufficient.” Matthew 6:34. God is not asking you to carry the whole week tonight. Bring him this moment. Take the next faithful step. Let tomorrow rest in his hands.

verse.text: Therefore, don’t be anxious for tomorrow, for tomorrow will be anxious for itself. Each day’s own evil is sufficient.

visual_style: Cinematic devotional realism, warm amber dawn and deep navy shadows, reverent Christian symbolism, soft film grain, no text, no logos, no depiction of Jesus, vertical 9:16.
